Spring Data MongoDB
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert.ReferenceResolver

Packages that use ReferenceResolver
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert
Spring Data MongoDB specific converter infrastructure.

  • Uses of ReferenceResolver in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert

    Subinterfaces of ReferenceResolver in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    DbRefResolver
    Used to resolve associations annotated with DBRef.
    Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert that implement ReferenceResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultDbRefResolver
    A DbRefResolver that resolves DBRefs by delegating to a DbRefResolverCallback than is able to generate lazy loading proxies.
    class 
    DefaultReferenceResolver
    ReferenceResolver implementation that uses a given ReferenceLookupDelegate to load and convert entity associations expressed via a persitent property.
    enum 
    NoOpDbRefResolver
    No-Operation DBRef resolver throwing UnsupportedOperationException when attempting to resolve database references.
